name: storage room
hints: There is a vat of water and a radiation suit here. Both may be important.
Fill your pail from the water vat. The anti-radiation suit protects you near the reactor.
FILL PAIL (with water from the vat) and WEAR SUIT for radiation protection before entering the reactor core.
FILL PAIL with water, WEAR SUIT. The water-filled pail is needed to defuse the bomb. The suit protects in the reactor area. EAST returns to anteroom.
notes: Storage room with the heavy water vat (fill pail here) and anti-radiation suit (wear before entering reactor core). EAST returns to the blue anteroom (room 15). The water-filled pail is essential for defusing the bomb.
